issues.detail: Instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
Bash commands used for npm install without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Add a /deploy slash command with an interactive confirmation button
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @slack/bolt with app.command('/deploy') awaiting ack() within 3 seconds, then responds with Block Kit blocks plus a text fallback and uses app.action for the button — all patterns explicitly documented; baseline writes a raw Express handler with webhooks and JSON payloads, missing the ack-then-respond pattern.

scenarios.name: Run a local Slack bot without exposing a public URL
scenarios.rationale: Treatment selects Socket Mode with SLACK_APP_TOKEN (xapp-), instantiates new App({ token, signingSecret, socketMode: true, appToken }), and notes app_mention/message.im event subscriptions per the skill; baseline defaults to ngrok + HTTP request URL and never mentions Socket Mode.
